title: Instrument d'adhésion

pages.text:
George, by the Grace of God, of the

United Kingdom of Great Jritain ano freland and of the JBritish

Domínions beyond the Seas Ting,

Defender of the faith, Emperor of Endía, dc., &c., &c. To all and singular to whom tbese Dresents shall come, Greeting!

bereas an Agreement between Us and

other Powers and Statcs, providing for the establishment of an International Veterinary Bureau,

was

concluded and signed at Paris on the Twenty-fifth day of January in the year of Our Lord One

Thousand Nine Hundred and Twenty-four, by the

Plenipotentiaries of Us and of the said Powers and

States duly and respectively authorised for that purpose, which Agreement is, word for word, as follows:—

Elno whereas a Declaration was made by

Our Plenipotentiary at the time of the signature of the said Agreement, which Declaration is, word for word, as follows :—

Tule, having

seen and considered the

Agreement aforesaid, have approved, accepted, and confirmed the same in all and every one of its Articles and Clauses, as We do by these Presents approve, accept, confirm, and ratify it for Ourselves, Our Heirs and Successors; engaging and promising upon Our

Royal Word that We will sincerely and faithfully perform and observe all and singular the things which are contained and expressed in the Agreement aforesaid, and that We will never suffer the same to be violated by any one, or transgressed in any manner, as far as it lies in Our power; subject, however, to the reservations which are contained in the Declaration aforementioned.

For the greater testimony and validity of all which, We have caused Our Great Seal to be affixed to these

Presents, which We have signed with Our Royal

Hand.

Biven at Our Court of St. James, the

Ninth day of March, in the year of Our Lord

One Thousand Nine Hundred and Twenty-five, and in the Fifteenth year of Our Reign.

joo gik.
